unit.note: Full shared/tests suite green (3498 passed, 16 skipped, 20 deselected). New file test_phase_quality_sentinel_rollup_filter.py: 21 passed.

integration.note: no cross_component flag; end-to-end backlog test covered in the unit suite

surface_verification.justification: Pure Python library change to the phase-quality rollup READ layer (shared/scripts/lib/phase_quality/). There is no web/cli/api product surface in this framework monorepo; the change touches no API route, store mutation, SSE/WS handler, message contract, or UI-consumed code. Executable verification IS the test suite: 21 new unit + end-to-end backlog tests (per-consumer filtering, raw-vs-view split, GC, backlog dismiss/append) plus the full shared/tests regression (3498 passed) — all green. Probe: live collect_in_scope_fails returned [iterate:S2] before the fix and [] after (sentinel excluded).

behaviors.behavior: is_sentinel_run truth table (None/empty/whitespace/UNKNOWN -> sentinel; real ids -> not) + LoadedFinding.is_sentinel (AC-1)
load_actionable_findings filters sentinel, preserves raw set + newest-first order (AC-2/AC-6)
gc_old_findings still archives a sentinel snapshot by mtime (AC-6, raw lifecycle unchanged)
collect_in_scope_fails drops sentinel-only FAIL, keeps non-sentinel engaged FAIL, and un-masks an older real FAIL (AC-3/AC-5)
emit_phase_quality_backlog ignores sentinel-only (0 open) and appends for a non-sentinel FAIL (AC-7, end-to-end)
dashboard / session digest / report renderers omit sentinel-only snapshots (AC-4)
rollup-layer sentinel set stays equivalent to the audit-time guard set (external-review #1 drift-pin)
existing phase-quality renderer/triage suites stay green (AC-8 regression)
touched files respect the bloat anti-ratchet baseline (AC-9)
behaviors.evidence: anti_ratchet_check.py --staged exit 0 (_triage_bundle.py held at its 308 baseline)
doc prose; the documented behavior is itself pinned by the tests above
